abolish.rawDefinition: To end a law, system, institution, custom or practice.

abortion.rawDefinition: The expulsion from the womb of a foetus or embryo before it is fully developed, with loss of the foetus; either naturally as a spontaneous abortion (now usually called a miscarriage), or deliberately as an induced abortion.

accelerate.rawDefinition: To cause to move faster; to quicken the motion of; to add to the speed of.

accomplishment.rawDefinition: The act of accomplishing; completion; fulfilment.

accountability.rawDefinition: The state of being accountable; liability to be called on to render an account; accountableness; responsible for; answerable for.

accountable.rawDefinition: Obliged, when called upon, to answer (for one’s deeds); answerable.

accumulate.rawDefinition: To heap up in a mass; to pile up; to collect or bring together (either literally or figuratively)

accumulation.rawDefinition: The act of amassing or gathering, as into a pile.

accused.rawDefinition: To find fault with, blame, censure

acquisition.rawDefinition: The act or process of acquiring.

activation.rawDefinition: Making active and effective; bringing into a state of activity.

activist.rawDefinition: One who is politically active in the role of a citizen; especially, one who campaigns for change.

acute.rawDefinition: A person who has the acute form of a disorder, such as schizophrenia.

adaptation.rawDefinition: The process of adapting something or becoming adapted to a situation; adjustment, modification.

adhere.rawDefinition: To stick fast or cleave, as a glutinous substance does; to become joined or united.

adjacent.rawDefinition: Something that lies next to something else, especially the side of a right triangle that is neither the hypotenuse nor the opposite.

administer.rawDefinition: To cause to ingest (a drug), either by openly offering or through deceit.

administrative.rawDefinition: Of or relating to administering or administration.

administrator.rawDefinition: One who administers affairs; one who directs, manages, executes, or dispenses, whether in civil, judicial, political, or ecclesiastical affairs; a manager

admission.rawDefinition: The act or practice of admitting.

adolescent.rawDefinition: A person who is in adolescence; someone who has reached puberty but is not yet an adult.

adverse.rawDefinition: Unfavorable; antagonistic in purpose or effect; hostile; actively opposing one's interests or wishes; contrary to one's welfare; acting against; working in an opposing direction.

advocate.rawDefinition: Someone whose job is to speak for someone's case in a court of law; a counsel.

aesthetic.rawDefinition: The study of art or beauty.

aftermath.rawDefinition: A second mowing; the grass which grows after the first crop of hay in the same season.

aggression.rawDefinition: The act of initiating hostilities or invasion.

agricultural.rawDefinition: A product or commodity from agriculture.

allocate.rawDefinition: To set aside for a purpose.

allocation.rawDefinition: The process or procedure for allocating things, especially money or other resources.

ally.rawDefinition: A person, group, or state (etc) which is associated with another for a common cause; one united to another by treaty or common purpose; a confederate.

ambassador.rawDefinition: A minister of the highest rank sent to a foreign court to represent there his sovereign or country. (Sometimes called ambassador-in-residence)

amend.rawDefinition: (usually in the plural) An act of righting a wrong; compensation.

amendment.rawDefinition: An alteration or change for the better; correction of a fault or of faults; reformation of life by quitting vices.

amid.rawDefinition: In the middle of; in the center of; surrounded by.

analogy.rawDefinition: A relationship of resemblance or equivalence between two situations, people, or objects, especially when used as a basis for explanation or extrapolation.

anonymous.rawDefinition: Lacking a name; not named, for example an animal not assigned to any species.

apparatus.rawDefinition: The entirety of means whereby a specific production is made existent or task accomplished.

appetite.rawDefinition: Desire to eat food or consume drink.

appreciation.rawDefinition: A fair valuation or estimate of merit, worth, weight, etc.; recognition of excellence.

arbitrary.rawDefinition: Anything arbitrary, such as an arithmetical value or a fee.

archive.rawDefinition: A place for storing earlier, and often historical, material. An archive usually contains documents (letters, records, newspapers, etc.) or other types of media kept for historical interest.

arena.rawDefinition: An enclosed area, often outdoor, for the presentation of sporting events (sports arena) or other spectacular events; earthen area, often oval, specifically for rodeos (North America) or circular area for bullfights (especially Hispanic America).

arguably.rawDefinition: As can be supported or proven by sound logical deduction, evidence, and precedent.

articulate.rawDefinition: An animal of the subkingdom Articulata.

aspiration.rawDefinition: The act of aspiring or ardently desiring; an ardent wish or desire, chiefly after what is elevated or spiritual (with common adjunct adpositions being to and of).

aspire.rawDefinition: To have a strong desire or ambition to achieve something.

assassination.rawDefinition: The murder of a person, especially for political reasons or for personal gain.

assault.rawDefinition: A violent onset or attack with physical means, for example blows, weapons, etc.

atrocity.rawDefinition: An extremely cruel act; a horrid act of injustice.

attain.rawDefinition: To gain (an object or desired result).

attorney.rawDefinition: A lawyer; one who advises or represents others in legal matters as a profession.

attribute.rawDefinition: A characteristic or quality of a thing.

authentic.rawDefinition: Of the same origin as claimed; genuine.

authorize.rawDefinition: To grant (someone) the permission or power necessary to do (something).

autonomy.rawDefinition: Self-government; freedom to act or function independently.

backdrop.rawDefinition: A decorated cloth hung at the back of a stage.

backing.rawDefinition: To go in the reverse direction.

bail.rawDefinition: Security, usually a sum of money, exchanged for the release of an arrested person as a guarantee of that person's appearance for trial.

ballot.rawDefinition: Originally, a small ball placed in a container to cast a vote; now, by extension, a piece of paper or card used for this purpose, or some other means used to signify a vote.

banner.rawDefinition: A flag or standard used by a military commander, monarch or nation.

bass.rawDefinition: A low spectrum of sound tones.

battlefield.rawDefinition: The area where a land battle is or was fought, which is not necessarily a field.

beam.rawDefinition: Any large piece of timber or iron long in proportion to its thickness, and prepared for use.

benchmark.rawDefinition: A standard by which something is evaluated or measured.

beneficiary.rawDefinition: One who benefits or receives an advantage.

betray.rawDefinition: To deliver into the hands of an enemy by treachery or fraud, in violation of trust; to give up treacherously or faithlessly.

boom.rawDefinition: A low-pitched, resonant sound, such as of an explosion.

boundary.rawDefinition: The dividing line or location between two areas.

breach.rawDefinition: A gap or opening made by breaking or battering, as in a wall, fortification or levee / embankment; the space between the parts of a solid body rent by violence

breakdown.rawDefinition: A failure, particularly mechanical; something that has failed

breakthrough.rawDefinition: An advance through and past enemy lines.

breed.rawDefinition: All animals or plants of the same species or subspecies.

brutal.rawDefinition: Savagely violent, vicious, ruthless, or cruel

buck.rawDefinition: A male deer, antelope, sheep, goat, rabbit, hare, and sometimes the male of other animals such as the hamster, ferret and shad.

buffer.rawDefinition: Of the color of buff leather, a brownish yellow.

bureaucracy.rawDefinition: Government by bureaus or their administrators or officers.

canvas.rawDefinition: A type of coarse cloth, woven from hemp, useful for making sails and tents or as a surface for paintings.

capability.rawDefinition: The power or ability to generate an outcome

capitalism.rawDefinition: A socio-economic system based on private ownership of resources or capital.

capitalist.rawDefinition: A person who is a supporter of capitalism.

cargo.rawDefinition: Freight carried by a ship, aircraft, or motor vehicle.

casualty.rawDefinition: Something that happens by chance, especially an unfortunate event; an accident, a disaster.

catalogue.rawDefinition: A systematic list of names, books, pictures etc.

caution.rawDefinition: Precept or warning against evil or danger of any kind; exhortation to wariness; advice; injunction; prudence in regard to danger; provident care

circulate.rawDefinition: To move in circles or through a circuit

circulation.rawDefinition: The act of moving in a circle, or in a course which brings the moving body to the place where its motion began.

citizenship.rawDefinition: The status of being a citizen, in its various senses.

civic.rawDefinition: Of, relating to, or belonging to a city, a citizen, or citizenship; municipal or civil.

civilian.rawDefinition: A person following the pursuits of civil life, especially one who is not an active member of the armed forces.

clarity.rawDefinition: The state or measure of being clear, either in appearance, thought or style; lucidity.

clash.rawDefinition: A loud sound, like the crashing together of metal objects.

classification.rawDefinition: The act of forming into a class or classes; a distribution into groups, as classes, orders, families, etc., according to some common relations or attributes.

cling.rawDefinition: Fruit (especially peach) whose flesh adheres strongly to the pit.

clinical.rawDefinition: A medical student's session spent in a real-world nursing environment.

closure.rawDefinition: An event or occurrence that signifies an ending.

cluster.rawDefinition: A group or bunch of several discrete items that are close to each other.

coalition.rawDefinition: A temporary group or union of organizations, usually formed for a particular advantage.

coincide.rawDefinition: To occupy exactly the same space.

collaborate.rawDefinition: To work together with others to achieve a common goal.

collective.rawDefinition: A farm owned by a collection of people

colonial.rawDefinition: A person from a country that is or was controlled by another.

columnist.rawDefinition: A regular writer of a column, such as in a magazine or newspaper

combat.rawDefinition: A battle, a fight (often one in which weapons are used).

commentary.rawDefinition: A series of comments or annotations; especially, a book of explanations or expositions on the whole or a part of some other work

commentator.rawDefinition: A person who comments; especially someone who is paid to give his/her opinions in the media about current affairs, sports, etc.

commerce.rawDefinition: The exchange or buying and selling of commodities; especially the exchange of merchandise, on a large scale, between different places or communities; extended trade or traffic.

commodity.rawDefinition: Anything movable (a good) that is bought and sold.

communist.rawDefinition: An advocate of a society based on the common ownership of property; a proponent of communism.

companion.rawDefinition: A friend, acquaintance, or partner; someone with whom one spends time or keeps company

compensation.rawDefinition: The act or principle of compensating.

competence.rawDefinition: The quality or state of being competent, i.e. able or suitable for a general role.

competent.rawDefinition: Having sufficient skill, knowledge, ability, or qualifications.

complement.rawDefinition: A protective substance that exists in the serum or other bodily fluid and is capable of killing microorganisms; complement.

complexity.rawDefinition: The state of being complex; intricacy; entanglement.

complication.rawDefinition: The act or process of complicating.

comply.rawDefinition: To yield assent; to accord; to acquiesce, agree, consent; to adapt oneself, to conform.

composition.rawDefinition: The act of putting together; assembly.

compromise.rawDefinition: The settlement of differences by arbitration or by consent reached by mutual concessions.

conceal.rawDefinition: To hide something from view or from public knowledge, to try to keep something secret.

concede.rawDefinition: To yield or suffer; to surrender; to grant

conceive.rawDefinition: To develop an idea; to form in the mind; to plan; to devise; to originate.

condemn.rawDefinition: To strongly criticise or denounce; to excoriate the perpetrators of.

confer.rawDefinition: To grant as a possession; to bestow.

confession.rawDefinition: The open admittance of having done something (especially something bad).

configuration.rawDefinition: Form, as depending on the relative disposition of the parts of a thing's shape; figure; form factor.

confine.rawDefinition: (chiefly in the plural) A boundary or limit.

confront.rawDefinition: To stand or meet facing, especially in competition, hostility or defiance; to come face to face with

confrontation.rawDefinition: The act of confronting or challenging another, especially face to face.

conscience.rawDefinition: The moral sense of right and wrong, chiefly as it affects one's own behaviour.

consciousness.rawDefinition: The state of being conscious or aware; awareness.

consecutive.rawDefinition: A sequence of notes or chords that results from repeated shifts in pitch of the same interval.

consensus.rawDefinition: A process of decision-making that seeks widespread agreement among group members.

conserve.rawDefinition: Wilderness where human development is prohibited.

constitutional.rawDefinition: A walk that is taken regularly for good health and wellbeing.

contemplate.rawDefinition: To look at on all sides or in all its aspects; to view or consider with continued attention; to regard with deliberate care; to meditate on; to study, ponder, or consider.

contempt.rawDefinition: The state or act of contemning; the feeling or attitude of regarding someone or something as inferior, base, or worthless; scorn, disdain.

contend.rawDefinition: To strive in opposition; to contest; to dispute; to vie; to quarrel; to fight.

contender.rawDefinition: Someone who competes with one or more other people.

contractor.rawDefinition: A person or company that builds or improves buildings.

contributor.rawDefinition: A benefactor; someone who donates to charity or some cause.

conversion.rawDefinition: The act of converting something or someone.

convict.rawDefinition: A person convicted of a crime by a judicial body.

cooperative.rawDefinition: A type of company that is owned partially or wholly by its employees, customers or tenants.

coordinate.rawDefinition: A number representing the position of a point along a line, arc, or similar one-dimensional figure.

coordination.rawDefinition: The act of coordinating, making different people or things work together for a goal or effect.

copyright.rawDefinition: The right by law to be the entity which determines who may publish, copy and distribute a piece of writing, music, picture or other work of authorship.

correlate.rawDefinition: Either of a pair of things related by a correlation; a correlative.

correlation.rawDefinition: A reciprocal, parallel or complementary relationship between two or more comparable objects.

correspond.rawDefinition: (constructed with to) To be equivalent or similar in character, quantity, quality, origin, structure, function etc.

correspondent.rawDefinition: Someone who or something which corresponds.

corresponding.rawDefinition: (constructed with to) To be equivalent or similar in character, quantity, quality, origin, structure, function etc.

corrupt.rawDefinition: To make corrupt; to change from good to bad; to draw away from the right path; to deprave; to pervert.

corruption.rawDefinition: The act of corrupting or of impairing integrity, virtue, or moral principle; the state of being corrupted or debased; loss of purity or integrity

credibility.rawDefinition: Reputation impacting one's ability to be believed.

crude.rawDefinition: Any substance in its natural state.

cult.rawDefinition: A group or sect of people with a deviant religious, philosophical or cultural identity, often existing on the margins of society or exploitative towards its members.

custody.rawDefinition: The legal right to take care of something or somebody, especially children.

cutting.rawDefinition: (heading) To incise, to cut into the surface of something.

cynical.rawDefinition: Of or relating to the belief that human actions are motivated only or primarily by base desires or selfishness.

debris.rawDefinition: Rubble, wreckage, scattered remains of something destroyed.

debut.rawDefinition: A performer's first performance to the public, in sport, the arts or some other area.

decision-making.rawDefinition: The process of reaching a decision.

decisive.rawDefinition: Having the power or quality of deciding a question or controversy; putting an end to contest or controversy; final; conclusive.

declaration.rawDefinition: A written or oral indication of a fact, opinion, or belief.

dedicated.rawDefinition: To set apart for a deity or for religious purposes; consecrate.

dedication.rawDefinition: The act of dedicating or the state of being dedicated.

deem.rawDefinition: An opinion, a judgment, a surmise.

default.rawDefinition: The condition of failing to meet an obligation.

deficit.rawDefinition: Deficiency in amount or quality; a falling short; lack.

delegate.rawDefinition: A person authorized to act as representative for another; a deputy

denounce.rawDefinition: To make known in a formal manner; to proclaim; to announce; to declare.

density.rawDefinition: A measure of the mass of matter contained by a unit volume.

dependence.rawDefinition: The state of being dependent, of relying upon another.

descent.rawDefinition: An instance of descending; act of coming down.

designate.rawDefinition: To mark out and make known; to point out; to indicate; to show; to distinguish by marks or description

detain.rawDefinition: To keep someone from proceeding by holding them back or making claims on their attention.

detection.rawDefinition: The act of detecting or sensing something; discovering something that was hidden or disguised.

detention.rawDefinition: The act of detaining or the state of being detained.

deteriorate.rawDefinition: To make worse; to make inferior in quality or value; to impair.

devastate.rawDefinition: To ruin many or all things over a large area, such as most or all buildings of a city, or cities of a region, or trees of a forest.

devise.rawDefinition: The act of leaving real property in a will.

diagnose.rawDefinition: To determine which disease is causing a sick person's signs and symptoms; to find the diagnosis.

diagnosis.rawDefinition: To determine which disease is causing a sick person's signs and symptoms; to find the diagnosis.

dictator.rawDefinition: A totalitarian leader of a country, nation, or government.

differentiate.rawDefinition: Something that has been differentiated or stratified.

dignity.rawDefinition: The state of being dignified or worthy of esteem: elevation of mind or character.

dilemma.rawDefinition: A circumstance in which a choice must be made between two or more alternatives that seem equally undesirable.

dimension.rawDefinition: A single aspect of a given thing.

diplomat.rawDefinition: A person, such as an ambassador, who is accredited to represent a government officially in its relations with other governments or international organisations

diplomatic.rawDefinition: The science of diplomas, or the art of deciphering ancient writings and determining their age, authenticity, etc.; paleography.

disastrous.rawDefinition: Of the nature of a disaster; calamitous.

discharge.rawDefinition: Pus or exudate (other than blood) from a wound or orifice, usually due to infection or pathology.

discretion.rawDefinition: The quality of being discreet or circumspect.

discrimination.rawDefinition: Discernment, the act of discriminating, discerning, distinguishing, noting or perceiving differences between things, with intent to understand rightly and make correct decisions.

dismissal.rawDefinition: The act of sending someone away.

displace.rawDefinition: To put out of place; to disarrange.

disposal.rawDefinition: An arrangement, categorization or classification of things.

dispose.rawDefinition: The disposal or management of something.

dispute.rawDefinition: An argument or disagreement, a failure to agree.

distort.rawDefinition: To bring something out of shape, to misshape.

disturbing.rawDefinition: To confuse a quiet, constant state or a calm, continuous flow, in particular: thoughts, actions or liquids.

divert.rawDefinition: To turn aside from a course.

divine.rawDefinition: One skilled in divinity; a theologian.

doctrine.rawDefinition: A belief or tenet, especially about philosophical or theological matters.

documentation.rawDefinition: Something transposed from a thought to a document; the written account of an idea.

domain.rawDefinition: A geographic area owned or controlled by a single person or organization.

dominance.rawDefinition: The state of being dominant; of prime importance; supremacy.

drift.rawDefinition: (physical) Movement; that which moves or is moved.

dual.rawDefinition: Of an item that is one of a pair, the other item in the pair.

dub.rawDefinition: To confer knighthood; the conclusion of the ceremony was marked by a tap on the shoulder with a sword.

dynamic.rawDefinition: A characteristic or manner of an interaction; a behavior.

ecological.rawDefinition: Relating to ecology, the interrelationships of organisms and their environment.

educator.rawDefinition: A person distinguished for his/her educational work, a teacher.

effectiveness.rawDefinition: The property of being effective, of achieving results.

efficiency.rawDefinition: The extent to which time is well used for the intended task.

elaborate.rawDefinition: To develop in detail or complexity

electoral.rawDefinition: Relating to or composed of electors.

elevate.rawDefinition: To raise (something) to a higher position.

elite.rawDefinition: A special group or social class of people which have a superior intellectual, social or economic status as, the elite of society.

embark.rawDefinition: To get on a boat or ship or (outside the USA) an aeroplane.

embed.rawDefinition: An embedded reporter or journalist, such as a war reporter assigned to and travelling with a military unit, or a political reporter assigned to follow and report on the campaign of a candidate.

embody.rawDefinition: To represent in a physical or concrete form; to incarnate or personify.

emergence.rawDefinition: The act of rising out of a fluid, or coming forth from envelopment or concealment, or of rising into view; sudden uprising or appearance.

empirical.rawDefinition: Pertaining to or based on experience.

empower.rawDefinition: To give permission, power, or the legal right to do something.

encompass.rawDefinition: To form a circle around; to encircle.

endeavour.rawDefinition: A sincere attempt; a determined or assiduous effort towards a specific goal; assiduous or persistent activity.

engagement.rawDefinition: An appointment, especially to speak or perform.

enterprise.rawDefinition: A company, business, organization, or other purposeful endeavor.

enthusiast.rawDefinition: A person filled with or guided by enthusiasm.

entity.rawDefinition: That which has a distinct existence as an individual unit. Often used for organisations which have no physical form.

epidemic.rawDefinition: A widespread disease that affects many individuals in a population.

equation.rawDefinition: The act or process of equating two or more things, or the state of those things being equal (that is, identical).

erect.rawDefinition: Upright; vertical or reaching broadly upwards.

escalate.rawDefinition: To increase (something) in extent or intensity; to intensify or step up.

essence.rawDefinition: The inherent nature of a thing or idea.

establishment.rawDefinition: The act of establishing; a ratifying or ordaining; settlement; confirmation.

eternal.rawDefinition: One who lives forever; an immortal.

evacuate.rawDefinition: To leave or withdraw from; to quit; to retire from

evoke.rawDefinition: To call out; to draw out or bring forth.

evolutionary.rawDefinition: Of or relating to the biological theory of evolution.

excess.rawDefinition: The state of surpassing or going beyond limits; the being of a measure beyond sufficiency, necessity, or duty; that which exceeds what is usual or proper

exclusion.rawDefinition: The act of excluding or shutting out; removal from consideration or taking part.

exclusive.rawDefinition: Information (or an artefact) that is granted or obtained exclusively.

exclusively.rawDefinition: (focus) to the exclusion of anything or anyone else; solely or entirely

execute.rawDefinition: To kill as punishment for capital crimes.

execution.rawDefinition: The act, manner or style of executing (actions, maneuvers, performances).

exile.rawDefinition: The state of being banished from one's home or country.

expenditure.rawDefinition: Act of expending or paying out.

extremist.rawDefinition: A person who holds extreme views, especially one who advocates such views; a radical or fanatic.

faction.rawDefinition: A group of people, especially within a political organization, which expresses a shared belief or opinion different from people who are not part of the group.

faculty.rawDefinition: The academic staff at schools, colleges, universities or not-for-profit research institutes, as opposed to the students or support staff.

fairness.rawDefinition: The property of being fair or equitable.

fatal.rawDefinition: A fatality; an event that leads to death.

feat.rawDefinition: A relatively rare or difficult accomplishment.

feminist.rawDefinition: An advocate of feminism; a person who believes in bringing about the equality of the sexes (of women and men) in all aspects of public and private life

fibre.rawDefinition: A single piece of a given material, elongated and roughly round in cross-section, often twisted with other fibres to form thread.

fierce.rawDefinition: Exceedingly violent, severe, ferocious, cruel or savage.

film-maker.rawDefinition: A producer or director of films/movies.

filter.rawDefinition: A device which separates a suspended, dissolved, or particulate matter from a fluid, solution, or other substance; any device that separates one substance from another.

firearm.rawDefinition: A personal weapon that uses explosive powder to propel a projectile often made of lead.

fixture.rawDefinition: Something that is fixed in place, especially a permanent appliance or other item of personal property that is considered part of a house and is sold with it; compare fitting, furnishing.

fleet.rawDefinition: A group of vessels or vehicles.

flesh.rawDefinition: The soft tissue of the body, especially muscle and fat.

flexibility.rawDefinition: The quality of being flexible; suppleness; pliability.

flourish.rawDefinition: A dramatic gesture such as the waving of a flag.

fluid.rawDefinition: Any substance which can flow with relative ease, tends to assume the shape of its container, and obeys Bernoulli's principle; a liquid, gas or plasma.

footage.rawDefinition: An amount of film or tape that has been used to record something.

foreigner.rawDefinition: A person from a foreign country.

forge.rawDefinition: Furnace or hearth where metals are heated prior to hammering them into shape.

formulate.rawDefinition: To reduce to, or express in, a formula; to put in a clear and definite form of statement or expression.

franchise.rawDefinition: The right to vote at a public election or referendum; see: suffrage, suffragette.

frankly.rawDefinition: (manner) In a frank, open or (too) honest manner.

functional.rawDefinition: A function that takes a function as its argument; More precisely: A function y=f(x) whose argument x varies in a space of (real valued, complex valued) functions and whose value belongs to a monodimensional space. An example: the definite integration of integrable real functions in a real interval.

fundraising.rawDefinition: The process of collecting money by requesting donations from individuals and businesses.

glory.rawDefinition: Great or overwhelming beauty or splendour.

governance.rawDefinition: The process, or the power, of governing; government or administration.

grave.rawDefinition: An excavation in the earth as a place of burial

gravity.rawDefinition: The state or condition of having weight; weight; heaviness.

grid.rawDefinition: A rectangular array of squares or rectangles of equal size, such as in a crossword puzzle.

grind.rawDefinition: The act of reducing to powder, or of sharpening, by friction.

grip.rawDefinition: To take hold of, particularly with the hand.

guerrilla.rawDefinition: A soldier in a small independent group, fighting against the government or regular forces by surprise raids.

gut.rawDefinition: The alimentary canal, especially the intestine.

hail.rawDefinition: Balls or pieces of ice falling as precipitation, often in connection with a thunderstorm.

halt.rawDefinition: To limp; move with a limping gait.

handling.rawDefinition: A touching, controlling, managing, using, take care of, etc., with the hand or hands, or as with the hands.

harassment.rawDefinition: Persistent attacks and criticism causing worry and distress.

haunt.rawDefinition: A place at which one is regularly found; a habitation or hangout.

hazard.rawDefinition: The chance of suffering harm; danger, peril, risk of loss.

heighten.rawDefinition: To make high; to raise higher; to elevate.

heritage.rawDefinition: An inheritance; property that may be inherited.

hierarchy.rawDefinition: A body of authoritative officials organized in nested ranks.

homeland.rawDefinition: The country that one regards as home.

hook.rawDefinition: A rod bent into a curved shape, typically with one end free and the other end secured to a rope or other attachment.

horizon.rawDefinition: The visible horizontal line or point (in all directions) that appears to connect the Earth to the sky.

hydrogen.rawDefinition: The lightest chemical element (symbol H), with an atomic number of 1 and atomic weight of 1.00794.

identification.rawDefinition: The act of identifying, or proving to be the same.

ideological.rawDefinition: Of or pertaining to an ideology.

ideology.rawDefinition: Doctrine, philosophy, body of beliefs or principles belonging to an individual or group.

ignorance.rawDefinition: The condition of being uninformed or uneducated. Lack of knowledge or information.

imagery.rawDefinition: The work of one who makes images or visible representation of objects.

imminent.rawDefinition: About to happen, occur, or take place very soon, especially of something which won't last long.

implementation.rawDefinition: The process of moving an idea from concept to reality. In business, engineering and other fields, implementation refers to the building process rather than the design process.

imprison.rawDefinition: To put in or as if in prison; confine.

imprisonment.rawDefinition: A confinement in a place, especially a prison or a jail, as punishment for a crime.

inability.rawDefinition: Lack of the ability to do something; incapability.

inappropriate.rawDefinition: Not appropriate; not suitable for the situation, time, or place.

incidence.rawDefinition: The act of something happening; occurrence.

inclined.rawDefinition: To bend or move (something) out of a given plane or direction, often the horizontal or vertical.

inclusion.rawDefinition: An addition or annex to a group, set, or total.

incur.rawDefinition: To bring upon oneself or expose oneself to, especially something inconvenient, harmful, or onerous; to become liable or subject to

indicator.rawDefinition: A pointer or index that indicates something.

indigenous.rawDefinition: Born or originating in, native to a land or region, especially before an intrusion.

induce.rawDefinition: To lead by persuasion or influence; incite or prevail upon.

indulge.rawDefinition: (often followed by "in"): To yield to a temptation or desire.

infamous.rawDefinition: Having a bad reputation, disreputable; notoriously bad, unpleasant or evil; widely known, especially for something bad.

inherent.rawDefinition: Naturally as part or consequence of something.

inhibit.rawDefinition: To hold in or hold back; to keep in check; restrain.

initiate.rawDefinition: A new member of an organization.

inmate.rawDefinition: A person confined to an institution such as a prison (as a convict) or hospital (as a patient).

intact.rawDefinition: Left complete or whole; not touched, defiled, sullied or otherwise damaged

intake.rawDefinition: The place where water, air or other fluid is taken into a pipe or conduit; opposed to outlet.

integral.rawDefinition: A number, the limit of the sums computed in a process in which the domain of a function is divided into small subsets and a possibly nominal value of the function on each subset is multiplied by the measure of that subset, all these products then being summed.

integrated.rawDefinition: To form into one whole; to make entire; to complete; to renew; to restore; to perfect.

integration.rawDefinition: The act or process of making whole or entire.

integrity.rawDefinition: Steadfast adherence to a strict moral or ethical code.

intellectual.rawDefinition: An intelligent, learned person, especially one who discourses about learned matters.

intensive.rawDefinition: Form of a word with a stronger or more forceful sense than the root on which the intensive is built.

intent.rawDefinition: A purpose; something that is intended.

interactive.rawDefinition: A feature (as in a museum) that can be interacted with.

interface.rawDefinition: The point of interconnection or contact between entities.

interfere.rawDefinition: To get involved or involve oneself, causing disturbance.

interference.rawDefinition: The act of interfering with something, or something that interferes.

interim.rawDefinition: A transitional or temporary period between other events.

interior.rawDefinition: The inside of a building, container, cavern, or other enclosed structure.

intervene.rawDefinition: To become involved in a situation, so as to alter or prevent an action.

intervention.rawDefinition: The action of intervening; interfering in some course of events.

intriguing.rawDefinition: To conceive or carry out a secret plan intended to harm; to form a plot or scheme.

invoke.rawDefinition: To call upon (a person, a god) for help, assistance or guidance.

involvement.rawDefinition: The act of involving, or the state of being involved.

ironic.rawDefinition: Characterized by or constituting (any kind of) irony.

ironically.rawDefinition: (manner) In an ironic manner; in a way displaying irony.

irony.rawDefinition: A statement that, when taken in context, may actually mean something different from, or the opposite of, what is written literally; the use of words expressing something other than their literal intention, often in a humorous context.

landmark.rawDefinition: An object that marks the boundary of a piece of land (usually a stone, or a tree).

large-scale.rawDefinition: Large in amount, scope or extent.

latter.rawDefinition: Relating to or being the second of two items.

lawsuit.rawDefinition: In civil law, a case where two or more people disagree and one or more of the parties take the case to a court for resolution.

layout.rawDefinition: A structured arrangement of items within certain limits.

leap.rawDefinition: The act of leaping or jumping.

legacy.rawDefinition: Money or property bequeathed to someone in a will.

legendary.rawDefinition: A collection of legends, in particular of lives of saints.

legislation.rawDefinition: The act of legislating; preparation and enactment of laws; the laws enacted.

legislative.rawDefinition: That branch of government which is responsible for making, or having the power to make, a law or laws.

legislature.rawDefinition: A governmental body with the power to make, amend and repeal laws.

legitimate.rawDefinition: A person born to a legally married couple.

lengthy.rawDefinition: Having length; long and overextended, especially in time rather than dimension.

lesbian.rawDefinition: A homosexual woman, one who is mostly or exclusively sexually or romantically attracted to other women.

lesser.rawDefinition: A thing that is of smaller size, value, importance etc.

liable.rawDefinition: Bound or obliged in law or equity; responsible; answerable.

liberal.rawDefinition: One with liberal views, supporting individual liberty (see Wikipedia's article on Liberalism).

liberation.rawDefinition: The act of liberating or the state of being liberated.

liberty.rawDefinition: The condition of being free from control or restrictions.

lifelong.rawDefinition: Extending for the entire duration of life.

likelihood.rawDefinition: The probability of a specified outcome; the chance of something happening; probability; the state or degree of being probable.

limb.rawDefinition: A major appendage of human or animal, used for locomotion (such as an arm, leg or wing).

linear.rawDefinition: Having the form of a line; straight or roughly straight; following a direct course.

line-up.rawDefinition: A physical or photographic queue of people allegedly involved in a crime, allowing a witness to identify them

linger.rawDefinition: To stay or remain in a place or situation, especially as if unwilling to depart or not easily able to do so; to loiter.

listing.rawDefinition: To create or recite a list.

literacy.rawDefinition: The ability to read and write.

lobby.rawDefinition: An entryway or reception area; vestibule; passageway; corridor.

logic.rawDefinition: A method of human thought that involves thinking in a linear, step-by-step manner about how a problem can be solved. Logic is the basis of many principles including the scientific method.

long-standing.rawDefinition: Having existed for a long time.

long-time.rawDefinition: Having endured for a long period of time.

loom.rawDefinition: A utensil; tool; a weapon; (usually in compound) an article in general.

loop.rawDefinition: A length of thread, line or rope that is doubled over to make an opening.

mainland.rawDefinition: The continent; the principal land, as distinguished from islands or a peninsula.

mainstream.rawDefinition: The principal current in a flow, such as a river or flow of air

maintenance.rawDefinition: Actions performed to keep some machine or system functioning or in service.

mandate.rawDefinition: An official or authoritative command; an order or injunction; a commission; a judicial precept.

mandatory.rawDefinition: A sign or line that require the path of the disc to be above, below or to one side of it.

manifest.rawDefinition: A list or invoice of the passengers or goods being carried by a commercial vehicle or ship.

manipulate.rawDefinition: To move, arrange or operate something using the hands

manipulation.rawDefinition: The practice of manipulating or the state of being manipulated.

manuscript.rawDefinition: A book, composition or any other document, written by hand (or manually typewritten), not mechanically reproduced.

marine.rawDefinition: A soldier, normally a member of a marine corps, trained to serve on board or from a ship

marketplace.rawDefinition: An open area in a town housing a public market.

massacre.rawDefinition: The killing of a considerable number (usually limited to people) where little or no resistance can be made, with indiscriminate violence, without necessity, and contrary to civilized norms.

mature.rawDefinition: Fully developed; grown up in terms of physical appearance, behaviour or thinking; ripe.

maximize.rawDefinition: To make as large as possible

meantime.rawDefinition: The time spent waiting for another event; time in between.

medieval.rawDefinition: Someone living in the Middle Ages.

meditation.rawDefinition: A devotional exercise of, or leading to contemplation.

melody.rawDefinition: Tune; sequence of notes that makes up a musical phrase

memoir.rawDefinition: An autobiography; a book describing the personal experiences of an author.

mentor.rawDefinition: A wise and trusted counselor or teacher

merchant.rawDefinition: A person who traffics in commodities for profit.

mercy.rawDefinition: Relenting; forbearance to cause or allow harm to another.

mere.rawDefinition: A body of standing water, such as a lake or a pond. More specifically, it can refer to a lake that is broad in relation to its depth. Also included in place names such as Windermere.

merge.rawDefinition: The joining together of multiple sources.

militia.rawDefinition: An army of trained civilians, which may be an official reserve army, called upon in time of need, the entire able-bodied population of a state which may also be called upon, or a private force not under government control.

minimal.rawDefinition: The smallest possible amount, quantity, or degree.

minimize.rawDefinition: To make (something) as small or as insignificant as possible.

misleading.rawDefinition: To lead astray, in a false direction.

mobility.rawDefinition: The ability to move; capacity for movement.

moderate.rawDefinition: One who holds an intermediate position between extremes, as in politics.

modification.rawDefinition: The form of existence belonging to a particular object, entity etc.; a mode of being.

momentum.rawDefinition: Of a body in motion: the tendency of a body to maintain its inertial motion; the product of its mass and velocity.

monopoly.rawDefinition: A situation, by legal privilege or other agreement, in which solely one party (company, cartel etc.) exclusively provides a particular product or service, dominating that market and generally exerting powerful control over it.

morality.rawDefinition: Recognition of the distinction between good and evil or between right and wrong; respect for and obedience to the rules of right conduct; the mental disposition or characteristic of behaving in a manner intended to produce morally good results.

motorist.rawDefinition: One who drives a motor vehicle.

municipal.rawDefinition: A financial instrument issued by a municipality.

naval.rawDefinition: Of or relating to a navy.

niche.rawDefinition: A cavity, hollow, or recess, generally within the thickness of a wall, for a statue, bust, or other erect ornament. Hence, any similar position, literal or figurative.

nominate.rawDefinition: To name someone as a candidate for a particular role or position, including that of an office.

nomination.rawDefinition: An act or instance of nominating.

nominee.rawDefinition: A person named, or designated, by another, to any office, duty, or position; one nominated, or proposed, by others for office or for election to office.

non-profit.rawDefinition: An organization that exists for reasons other than to make a profit, such as a charitable, educational or service organization.

notable.rawDefinition: A person or thing of distinction.

notably.rawDefinition: (focus) As a pointed example; in a notable manner.

notorious.rawDefinition: Widely known, especially for something negative; infamous.

novel.rawDefinition: Newly made, formed or evolved; having no precedent; of recent origin; new.

offering.rawDefinition: To propose or express one's willingness (to do something).

offspring.rawDefinition: A person's daughter(s) and/or son(s); a person's children.

operational.rawDefinition: Of or relating to operations, especially military operations.

optical.rawDefinition: Of, or relating to sight; visual.

optimism.rawDefinition: A tendency to expect the best, or at least, a favourable outcome

oral.rawDefinition: A spoken test or examination, particularly in a language class.

organizational.rawDefinition: Of, relating to, or produced by an organization.

orientation.rawDefinition: The determination of the relative position of something or someone.

originate.rawDefinition: To cause to be, to bring into existence; to produce, initiate.

outbreak.rawDefinition: An eruption; the sudden appearance of a rash, disease, etc.

outlet.rawDefinition: A vent or similar passage to allow the escape of something.

outlook.rawDefinition: A place from which something can be viewed.

outrage.rawDefinition: An excessively violent or vicious attack; an atrocity.

outsider.rawDefinition: One who is not part of a community or organization.

overlook.rawDefinition: A vista or point that gives a beautiful view.

overly.rawDefinition: Superficial; not thorough; careless, negligent, inattentive.

oversee.rawDefinition: To survey, look at something in a wide angle.

overturn.rawDefinition: A turning over or upside-down; inversion.

overwhelm.rawDefinition: The state or condition of being overwhelmed.

overwhelming.rawDefinition: To engulf, surge over and submerge.

parameter.rawDefinition: A value kept constant during an experiment, equation, calculation or similar, but varied over other versions of the experiment, equation, calculation, etc.

parental.rawDefinition: A person fulfilling a parental role.

parish.rawDefinition: In the Anglican, Eastern Orthodox, Lutheran and Roman Catholic Church, an administrative part of a diocese that has its own church.

partial.rawDefinition: A partial derivative: a derivative with respect to one independent variable of a function in multiple variables while holding the other variables constant.

partially.rawDefinition: To a partial degree or extent, incompletely.

pastor.rawDefinition: A shepherd; someone who tends to a flock of animals.

patent.rawDefinition: A declaration issued by a government agency declaring someone the inventor of a new invention and having the privilege of stopping others from making, using or selling the claimed invention; a letter patent.

pathway.rawDefinition: A footpath or other path or track.

petition.rawDefinition: A formal, written request made to an official person or organized body, often containing many signatures.

physician.rawDefinition: A practitioner of physic, i.e. a specialist in internal medicine, especially as opposed to a surgeon; a practitioner who treats with medication rather than with surgery.

pioneer.rawDefinition: One who goes before, as into the wilderness, preparing the way for others to follow.

pipeline.rawDefinition: A conduit made of pipes used to convey water, gas or petroleum etc.

plea.rawDefinition: An appeal, petition, urgent prayer or entreaty.

plead.rawDefinition: To present (an argument or a plea), especially in a legal case.

pledge.rawDefinition: A solemn promise to do something.

plunge.rawDefinition: The act of plunging or submerging

poll.rawDefinition: A survey of people, usually statistically analyzed to gauge wider public opinion.

portfolio.rawDefinition: A case for carrying papers, drawings, photographs, maps and other flat documents.

portray.rawDefinition: To paint or draw the likeness of.

postpone.rawDefinition: To delay or put off an event, appointment etc.

post-war.rawDefinition: Pertaining to a period of time immediately following the end of a war; where there is a cessation of conflict.

practitioner.rawDefinition: A person who practices a profession or art, especially law or medicine.

precedent.rawDefinition: An act in the past which may be used as an example to help decide the outcome of similar instances in the future.

precision.rawDefinition: The state of being precise or exact; exactness.

predator.rawDefinition: Any animal or other organism that hunts and kills other organisms (their prey), primarily for food.

predecessor.rawDefinition: One who precedes; one who has preceded another in any state, position, office, etc.; one whom another follows or comes after, in any office or position.

predominantly.rawDefinition: In a predominant manner. Most commonly or frequently by a large margin.

prejudice.rawDefinition: An adverse judgment or opinion formed beforehand or without knowledge of the facts.

preliminary.rawDefinition: A preparation for a main matter; an introduction.

premier.rawDefinition: (Westminster system) The head of government in parliament and leader of the cabinet.

preservation.rawDefinition: The act of preserving; care to preserve; act of keeping from destruction, decay or any ill.

preside.rawDefinition: To act as president or chairperson.

presidency.rawDefinition: The office or role of president.

presidential.rawDefinition: Pertaining to a president or presidency.

presume.rawDefinition: With infinitive object: to be so presumptuous as (to do something) without proper authority or permission.

prevail.rawDefinition: To be superior in strength, dominance, influence or frequency; to have or gain the advantage over others; to have the upper hand; to outnumber others.

prevalence.rawDefinition: The quality or condition of being prevalent; wide extension or spread.

prevention.rawDefinition: The act of preventing or hindering; obstruction of action, access, or approach; thwarting.

prey.rawDefinition: Anything, as goods, etc., taken or got by violence; anything taken by force from an enemy in war

principal.rawDefinition: The money originally invested or loaned, on which basis interest and returns are calculated.

privatization.rawDefinition: The transfer of a company or organization from government to private ownership and control.

privilege.rawDefinition: (ecclesiastical law) An exemption from certain laws granted by the Pope.

probe.rawDefinition: Any of various medical instruments used to explore wounds, organs, etc.

problematic.rawDefinition: (chiefly in the plural) A problem or difficulty in a particular field of study.

proceedings.rawDefinition: The act of one who proceeds, or who prosecutes a design or transaction

proceeds.rawDefinition: To move, pass, or go forward or onward; to advance; to carry on

processing.rawDefinition: To perform a particular process on a thing.

processor.rawDefinition: A person or institution who processes things (foods, photos, applications, etc.).

productivity.rawDefinition: The state of being productive, fertile or efficient

profound.rawDefinition: The deep; the sea; the ocean.

projection.rawDefinition: Something which projects, protrudes, juts out, sticks out, or stands out.

prominent.rawDefinition: Standing out, or projecting; jutting; protuberant

pronounced.rawDefinition: To declare formally, officially or ceremoniously.

propaganda.rawDefinition: A concerted set of messages aimed at influencing the opinions or behavior of large numbers of people.

prosperity.rawDefinition: The condition of being prosperous, of having good fortune

protocol.rawDefinition: The minutes, or official record, of a negotiation or transaction; especially a document drawn up officially which forms the legal basis for subsequent agreements based on it.

province.rawDefinition: A region of the earth or of a continent; a district or country.

provincial.rawDefinition: A person belonging to a province; one who is provincial.

provision.rawDefinition: An item of goods or supplies, especially food, obtained for future use.

provoke.rawDefinition: To cause someone to become annoyed or angry.

query.rawDefinition: A question, an inquiry (US), an enquiry (UK).

quest.rawDefinition: A journey or effort in pursuit of a goal (often lengthy, ambitious, or fervent); a mission.

quota.rawDefinition: A proportional part or share; the share or proportion assigned to each in a division.

radical.rawDefinition: (historical: 19th-century Britain) A member of the most progressive wing of the Liberal Party; someone favouring social reform (but generally stopping short of socialism).

raid.rawDefinition: A quick hostile or predatory incursion or invasion in a battle.

rally.rawDefinition: A public gathering or mass meeting that is not mainly a protest and is organized to inspire enthusiasm for a cause.

ratio.rawDefinition: A number representing a comparison between two named things.

rational.rawDefinition: A rational number: a number that can be expressed as the quotient of two integers.

readily.rawDefinition: Without unwillingness or hesitation; showing readiness.

realm.rawDefinition: An abstract sphere of influence, real or imagined.

reasoning.rawDefinition: To deduce or come to a conclusion by being rational

reassure.rawDefinition: To assure anew; to restore confidence to; to free from fear or self-doubt.

rebellion.rawDefinition: Armed resistance to an established government or ruler.

reconstruction.rawDefinition: A thing that has been reconstructed or restored to an earlier state.

referendum.rawDefinition: A direct popular vote on a proposed law or constitutional amendment. The adposition on is usually used before the related subject of the vote.

refuge.rawDefinition: A state of safety, protection or shelter.

regain.rawDefinition: To get back; to recover possession of.

relevance.rawDefinition: The property or state of being relevant or pertinent.

reliability.rawDefinition: The quality of being reliable, dependable or trustworthy.

remainder.rawDefinition: A part or parts remaining after some has/have been removed.

remains.rawDefinition: (chiefly in the plural) That which is left; relic; remainder.

removal.rawDefinition: The process of moving, or the fact of being removed.

render.rawDefinition: Stucco or plaster applied to walls (mostly to outside masonry walls).

replacement.rawDefinition: A person or thing that takes the place of another; a substitute.

reportedly.rawDefinition: According to reports or rumors; supposedly.

reproduce.rawDefinition: To produce an image or copy of.

reproduction.rawDefinition: The act of reproducing new individuals biologically.

resemble.rawDefinition: To be like or similar to (something); to represent as similar.

reside.rawDefinition: To dwell permanently or for a considerable time; to have a settled abode for a time; to remain for a long time.

residence.rawDefinition: The place where one lives; one's home.

residential.rawDefinition: A trip during which people temporarily live together.

resistance.rawDefinition: The act of resisting, or the capacity to resist.

respective.rawDefinition: Relating to particular persons or things, each to each; particular; own.

respectively.rawDefinition: In a relative manner; often used when comparing lists, where the term denotes that the items in the lists correspond to each other in the order they are given.

restoration.rawDefinition: The process of bringing an object back to its original state; the process of restoring something.

restraint.rawDefinition: Something that restrains, ties, fastens or secures

retreat.rawDefinition: The act of pulling back or withdrawing, as from something dangerous, or unpleasant.

revelation.rawDefinition: The act of revealing or disclosing.

revenge.rawDefinition: Any form of personal retaliatory action against an individual, institution, or group for some alleged or perceived harm or injustice.

revival.rawDefinition: The act of reviving, or the state of being revived

revive.rawDefinition: To return to life; to become reanimated or reinvigorated.

revolutionary.rawDefinition: A revolutionist; a person who revolts.

rhetoric.rawDefinition: The art of using language, especially public speaking, as a means to persuade.

riot.rawDefinition: Wanton or unrestrained behavior; uproar; tumult.

ritual.rawDefinition: Rite; a repeated set of actions

sacrifice.rawDefinition: The offering of anything to a god; a consecratory rite.

sanction.rawDefinition: An approval, by an authority, generally one that makes something valid.

scattered.rawDefinition: To (cause to) separate and go in different directions; to disperse.

scope.rawDefinition: The breadth, depth or reach of a subject; a domain.

scrutiny.rawDefinition: Intense study of someone or something.

secular.rawDefinition: A secular ecclesiastic, or one not bound by monastic rules.

seize.rawDefinition: To deliberately take hold of; to grab or capture.

selective.rawDefinition: Of or relating to the process of selection.

sensation.rawDefinition: A physical feeling or perception from something that comes into contact with the body; something sensed.

sensitivity.rawDefinition: The quality or state of being sensitive; sensitiveness.

sentiment.rawDefinition: A general thought, feeling, or sense.

separation.rawDefinition: The act of disuniting two or more things, or the condition of being separated.

serial.rawDefinition: A work, such as a work of fiction, published in installments, often numbered and without a specified end.

set-up.rawDefinition: Equipment designed for a particular purpose; an apparatus.

sexuality.rawDefinition: The quality of being sexual; that which is characterized or distinguished by sex.

shareholder.rawDefinition: One who owns shares of stock in a corporation.

shrug.rawDefinition: A lifting of the shoulders to signal indifference or a casual lack of knowledge.

simulate.rawDefinition: To model, replicate, duplicate the behavior, appearance or properties of.

simulation.rawDefinition: Something that simulates a system or environment in order to predict actual behaviour.

situated.rawDefinition: To place on or into a physical location.

solidarity.rawDefinition: A bond of unity or agreement between individuals, united around a common goal or against a common enemy, such as the unifying principle that defines the labor movement; mutual support within a group.

sovereignty.rawDefinition: (of a polity) The state of making laws and controlling resources without the coercion of other nations.

span.rawDefinition: The space from the thumb to the end of the little finger when extended; nine inches; an eighth of a fathom.

spark.rawDefinition: A small particle of glowing matter, either molten or on fire.

specialized.rawDefinition: To make distinct or separate, particularly:

specification.rawDefinition: An explicit set of requirements to be satisfied by a material, product, or service.

specimen.rawDefinition: An individual instance that represents a class; an example.

spectacle.rawDefinition: An exciting or extraordinary scene, exhibition, performance etc.

spectrum.rawDefinition: A range; a continuous, infinite, one-dimensional set, possibly bounded by extremes.

sphere.rawDefinition: A regular three-dimensional object in which every cross-section is a circle; the figure described by the revolution of a circle about its diameter .

spotlight.rawDefinition: A bright, directional light or lamp, especially one used to illuminate the focus or center of attention on a stage.

spouse.rawDefinition: A person in a marriage or marital relationship.

stability.rawDefinition: The condition of being stable or in equilibrium, and thus resistant to change.

stake.rawDefinition: A piece of wood or other material, usually long and slender, pointed at one end so as to be easily driven into the ground as a marker or a support or stay.

standing.rawDefinition: (heading) To position or be positioned physically.

steer.rawDefinition: A suggestion about a course of action.

stem.rawDefinition: The stock of a family; a race or generation of progenitors.

stereotype.rawDefinition: A conventional, formulaic, and often oversimplified or exaggerated conception, opinion, or image of (a person).

stimulus.rawDefinition: Any external phenomenon that has an influence on a system, by triggering or modifying an internal phenomenon.

strand.rawDefinition: The shore or beach of the sea or ocean; shore; beach.

submission.rawDefinition: The act of submitting or yielding; surrender.

subscriber.rawDefinition: A person who subscribes to a publication or a service

subscription.rawDefinition: Access to a resource for a period of time, generally for payment.

subsidy.rawDefinition: Financial support or assistance, such as a grant.

substantial.rawDefinition: Anything having substance; an essential part.

substantially.rawDefinition: In a strong substantial manner; considerably.

substitution.rawDefinition: The act of substituting or the state of being substituted.

subtle.rawDefinition: Hard to grasp; not obvious or easily understood; barely noticeable.

suburban.rawDefinition: A person who lives in a suburb.

succession.rawDefinition: An act of following in sequence.

successive.rawDefinition: Coming one after the other in a series.

successor.rawDefinition: A person or thing that immediately follows another in holding an office or title.

sue.rawDefinition: To file a legal action against someone, generally a non-criminal action.

suite.rawDefinition: A retinue or company of attendants, as of a distinguished personage

summit.rawDefinition: A peak; the topmost point or surface, as of a mountain.

superior.rawDefinition: A person of higher rank or quality.

supervise.rawDefinition: To oversee or direct a task or organization.

supervision.rawDefinition: The act or instance of supervising.

supervisor.rawDefinition: A person with the official task of overseeing the work of a person or group, or of other operations and activities.

supplement.rawDefinition: Something added, especially to make up for a deficiency.

supposedly.rawDefinition: As a matter of supposition; in the beliefs or according to the claims of some people.

suppress.rawDefinition: To put an end to, especially with force, to crush, do away with; to prohibit, subdue.

surge.rawDefinition: A sudden transient rush, flood or increase.

surgical.rawDefinition: Of, relating to, used in, or resulting from surgery.

surplus.rawDefinition: That which remains when use or need is satisfied, or when a limit is reached; excess; overplus.

surrender.rawDefinition: An act of surrendering, submission into the possession of another; abandonment, resignation.

surveillance.rawDefinition: Close observation of an individual or group; person or persons under suspicion.

suspension.rawDefinition: The act of suspending, or the state of being suspended.

systematic.rawDefinition: Carried out using a planned, ordered procedure.

tackle.rawDefinition: A device for grasping an object and an attached means of moving it, as a rope and hook.

tactic.rawDefinition: A maneuver, or action calculated to achieve some end.

taxpayer.rawDefinition: A person who is subject to, liable for, or pays tax as opposed to a nontaxpayer who is neither the subject nor the object of revenue laws.

tenant.rawDefinition: One who pays a fee (rent) in return for the use of land, buildings, or other property owned by others.

tenure.rawDefinition: A status of possessing a thing or an office; an incumbency.

terminal.rawDefinition: A building in an airport where passengers transfer from ground transportation to the facilities that allow them to board airplanes.

terminate.rawDefinition: To end, especially in an incomplete state.

terrain.rawDefinition: A single, distinctive rock formation; an area having a preponderance of a particular rock or group of rocks.

testify.rawDefinition: To make a declaration, or give evidence, under oath.

testimony.rawDefinition: Statements made by a witness in court.

texture.rawDefinition: The feel or shape of a surface or substance; the smoothness, roughness, softness, etc. of something.

theatrical.rawDefinition: A stage performance, especially one by amateurs.

theoretical.rawDefinition: Of or relating to theory; abstract; not empirical.

thereafter.rawDefinition: After that, from then on; thenceforth.

thereby.rawDefinition: By it; by that; by that means, or as a consequence of that.

thought-provoking.rawDefinition: Interesting in a way that challenges one's beliefs, attitudes, or perspective.

thread.rawDefinition: A long, thin and flexible form of material, generally with a round cross-section, used in sewing, weaving or in the construction of string.

threshold.rawDefinition: The bottom-most part of a doorway that one crosses to enter; a sill.

thrive.rawDefinition: To grow or increase stature; to grow vigorously or luxuriantly, to flourish.

timber.rawDefinition: Trees in a forest regarded as a source of wood.

timely.rawDefinition: Done at the proper time or within the proper time limits; prompt.

tolerance.rawDefinition: The ability to endure pain or hardship; endurance.

transcript.rawDefinition: Something which has been transcribed; a writing or composition consisting of the same words as the original; a written copy.

transformation.rawDefinition: The act of transforming or the state of being transformed.

transit.rawDefinition: The act of passing over, across, or through something.

transmission.rawDefinition: The act of transmitting, e.g. data or electric power.

transparency.rawDefinition: The quality of being transparent; transparence.

transparent.rawDefinition: (of a material or object) See-through, clear; having the property that light passes through it almost undisturbed, such that one can see through it clearly.

trauma.rawDefinition: Any serious injury to the body, often resulting from violence or an accident.

treaty.rawDefinition: A binding agreement concluded by subjects of international law, namely states and international organizations.

tribal.rawDefinition: A design or image that has been influenced by indigenous peoples; especially such a tattoo.

tribunal.rawDefinition: An assembly including one or more judges to conduct judicial business; a court of law.

tribute.rawDefinition: An acknowledgment of gratitude, respect or admiration; an accompanying gift.

trigger.rawDefinition: A finger-operated lever used to fire a gun.

triumph.rawDefinition: A conclusive success following an effort, conflict, or confrontation of obstacles; victory; conquest.

troubled.rawDefinition: To disturb, stir up, agitate (a medium, especially water).

tuition.rawDefinition: A sum of money paid for instruction (such as in a high school, boarding school, university, or college).

turnover.rawDefinition: The amount of money taken as sales transacted in a given period.

undergraduate.rawDefinition: A student at a university who has not yet received a degree.

underlying.rawDefinition: To lie in a position directly beneath.

undermine.rawDefinition: To dig underneath (something), to make a passage for destructive or military purposes; to sap.

unify.rawDefinition: Cause to become one; make into a unit; consolidate; merge; combine.

unprecedented.rawDefinition: Never before seen, done, or experienced; without precedent.

unveil.rawDefinition: To remove a veil from; to uncover; to reveal something hidden.

uphold.rawDefinition: To hold up; to lift on high; to elevate.

utility.rawDefinition: The state or condition of being useful; usefulness.

utilize.rawDefinition: To make use of; to use.

utterly.rawDefinition: Completely, entirely, to the fullest extent

validity.rawDefinition: The state of being valid, authentic or genuine.

venture.rawDefinition: A risky or daring undertaking or journey.

violate.rawDefinition: To break or disregard (a rule or convention).

violation.rawDefinition: The act or an instance of violating or the condition of being violated.

virtue.rawDefinition: Accordance with moral principles; conformity of behaviour or thought with the strictures of morality; good moral conduct.

vocal.rawDefinition: A vocal sound; specifically, a purely vocal element of speech, unmodified except by resonance; a vowel or a diphthong; a tonic element; a tonic; distinguished from a subvocal, and a nonvocal

vow.rawDefinition: A solemn promise to perform some act, or behave in a specified manner, especially a promise to live and act in accordance with the rules of a religious order.

vulnerability.rawDefinition: Susceptibility to attack or injury; the state or condition of being weak or poorly defended.

vulnerable.rawDefinition: More or most likely to be exposed to the chance of being attacked or harmed, either physically or emotionally.

ward.rawDefinition: A warden; a guard; a guardian or watchman.

warfare.rawDefinition: The waging of war or armed conflict against an enemy.

warrant.rawDefinition: Authorization or certification; a sanction, as given by a superior.

weaken.rawDefinition: To make weaker or less strong.

weave.rawDefinition: A type or way of weaving.

well-being.rawDefinition: A state of health, happiness and/or prosperity.

whereby.rawDefinition: (interrogative) By what, in which direction; how.

whilst.rawDefinition: (rare or literary in North America) While, at the same time.

wholly.rawDefinition: Completely and entirely; to the fullest extent.

withdrawal.rawDefinition: Receiving from someone's care what one has earlier entrusted to them. Usually refers to money.

worthwhile.rawDefinition: Good and important enough to spend time, effort, or money on.

yield.rawDefinition: To pay, give in payment; repay, recompense; reward; requite.

alien.rawDefinition: Any life form of extraterrestrial or extradimensional origin.

align.rawDefinition: To form a line; to fall into line.

alignment.rawDefinition: An arrangement of items in a line.

allegation.rawDefinition: An assertion, especially an accusation, not necessarily based on facts.

allege.rawDefinition: To state under oath, to plead.

assembly.rawDefinition: A set of pieces that work together in unison as a mechanism or device.

assert.rawDefinition: An assertion; a section of source code which tests whether an expected condition is true.

assertion.rawDefinition: The act of asserting; positive declaration or averment.

assurance.rawDefinition: The act of assuring; a declaration tending to inspire full confidence; that which is designed to give confidence.

bizarre.rawDefinition: Strangely unconventional in style or appearance.

blend.rawDefinition: A mixture of two or more things.

blessing.rawDefinition: To make something holy by religious rite, sanctify.

boast.rawDefinition: A brag; ostentatious positive appraisal of oneself.

chamber.rawDefinition: A room or set of rooms, particularly:

characterize.rawDefinition: To depict someone or something a particular way (often negative).

charter.rawDefinition: A document issued by some authority, creating a public or private institution, and defining its purposes and privileges.

chunk.rawDefinition: A part of something that has been separated.

compassion.rawDefinition: Deep awareness of the suffering of another, coupled with the wish to relieve it.

constitution.rawDefinition: The act, or process of setting something up, or establishing something; the composition or structure of such a thing; its makeup.

counselling.rawDefinition: To give advice, especially professional advice, to (somebody).

counsellor.rawDefinition: A professional who counsels people, especially on personal problems.

counterpart.rawDefinition: Either of two parts that fit together, or complement one another.

coup.rawDefinition: A quick, brilliant, and highly successful act.

depict.rawDefinition: To render a representation of something, using words, sounds, images, or other means.

deployment.rawDefinition: An arrangement or classification of things.

deprive.rawDefinition: To take something away from (someone) and keep it away; to deny someone something.

deputy.rawDefinition: One appointed as the substitute of another, and empowered to act for them, in their name or their behalf; a substitute in office

disrupt.rawDefinition: To throw into confusion or disorder.

disruption.rawDefinition: An interruption to the regular flow or sequence of something.

dissolve.rawDefinition: A form of film punctuation in which there is a gradual transition from one scene to the next

distinction.rawDefinition: That which distinguishes; a single occurrence of a determining factor or feature, the fact of being divided; separation, discrimination.

distinctive.rawDefinition: A distinctive thing: a quality or property permitting distinguishing; a characteristic.

endorse.rawDefinition: A diminutive of the pale, usually appearing in pairs on either side of a pale.

endorsement.rawDefinition: The act or quality of endorsing

endure.rawDefinition: To continue or carry on, despite obstacles or hardships; to persist.

enforce.rawDefinition: To keep up, impose or bring into effect something, not necessarily by force.

exploitation.rawDefinition: The act of utilizing something; industry.

glimpse.rawDefinition: A brief look, glance, or peek.

glorious.rawDefinition: Exhibiting attributes, qualities, or acts that are worthy of or receive glory.

hostage.rawDefinition: A person given as a pledge or security for the performance of the conditions of a treaty or similar agreement, such as to ensure the status of a vassal.

humanitarian.rawDefinition: A scholar of one of the subjects in the humanities.

humanity.rawDefinition: Mankind; human beings as a group.

insider.rawDefinition: A person who has special knowledge about the inner workings of a group, organization, or institution.

inspection.rawDefinition: The act of examining something, often closely.

instinct.rawDefinition: A natural or inherent impulse or behaviour.

institutional.rawDefinition: Of, pertaining to, characteristic of, or organized along the lines of an institution.

irrelevant.rawDefinition: Not related, not applicable, unimportant, not connected.

isolation.rawDefinition: The state of being isolated, detached, or separated.

judicial.rawDefinition: That branch of government which is responsible for maintaining the courts of law and for the administration of justice.

jurisdiction.rawDefinition: The power, right, or authority to interpret and apply the law.

justification.rawDefinition: A reason, explanation, or excuse which provides convincing, morally acceptable support for behavior or for a belief or occurrence.

loyalty.rawDefinition: The state of being loyal; fidelity.

machinery.rawDefinition: The machines constituting a production apparatus, in a plant etc., collectively.

magistrate.rawDefinition: A judicial officer with limited authority to administer and enforce the law. A magistrate's court may have jurisdiction in civil or criminal cases, or both.

magnetic.rawDefinition: Of, relating to, operating by, or caused by magnetism.

magnitude.rawDefinition: The absolute or relative size, extent or importance of something.

merit.rawDefinition: A claim to commendation or a reward.

methodology.rawDefinition: (originally science) The study of methods used in a field.

midst.rawDefinition: A place in the middle of something; may be used of a literal or metaphorical location.

migration.rawDefinition: An instance of moving to live in another place for a while.

patrol.rawDefinition: A going of the rounds along the chain of sentinels and between the posts, by a guard, usually consisting of three or four men, to insure greater security from attacks on the outposts.

patron.rawDefinition: One who protects or supports; a defender or advocate.

peculiar.rawDefinition: That which is peculiar; a sole or exclusive property; a prerogative; a characteristic.

persist.rawDefinition: To go on stubbornly or resolutely.

persistent.rawDefinition: Obstinately refusing to give up or let go.

premise.rawDefinition: A proposition antecedently supposed or proved; something previously stated or assumed as the basis of further argument; a condition; a supposition.

prescribe.rawDefinition: To order (a drug or medical device) for use by a particular patient (under licensed authority).

prescription.rawDefinition: The act of prescribing a rule, law, etc..

proposition.rawDefinition: The act of offering (an idea) for consideration.

prosecution.rawDefinition: The act of prosecuting a scheme or endeavor.

prospective.rawDefinition: The scene before or around, in time or in space; view; prospect.

regulator.rawDefinition: A device that controls or limits something.

rehabilitation.rawDefinition: The process of rehabilitating somebody or something.

rotation.rawDefinition: The act of turning around a centre or an axis.

ruling.rawDefinition: To regulate, be in charge of, make decisions for, reign over.

sack.rawDefinition: A bag; especially a large bag of strong, coarse material for storage and handling of various commodities, such as potatoes, coal, coffee; or, a bag with handles used at a supermarket, a grocery sack; or, a small bag for small items, a satchel.

sacred.rawDefinition: Characterized by solemn religious ceremony or religious use, especially, in a positive sense; consecrated, made holy.

slash.rawDefinition: A slashing action or motion, particularly:

slot.rawDefinition: A broad, flat, wooden bar, a slat, especially as used to secure a door, window, etc.

stumble.rawDefinition: A fall, trip or substantial misstep.

suspicion.rawDefinition: The act of suspecting something or someone, especially of something wrong.

sustain.rawDefinition: A mechanism which can be used to hold a note, as the right pedal on a piano.

syndrome.rawDefinition: A recognizable pattern of signs, symptoms and/or behaviours, especially of a disease or medical or psychological condition.

synthesis.rawDefinition: The formation of something complex or coherent by combining simpler things.

toll.rawDefinition: Loss or damage incurred through a disaster.

toxic.rawDefinition: Having a chemical nature that is harmful to health or lethal if consumed or otherwise entering into the body in sufficient quantities.

trademark.rawDefinition: A word, symbol, or phrase used to identify a particular company's product and differentiate it from other companies' products.

transaction.rawDefinition: The act of conducting or carrying out (business, negotiations, plans).

verdict.rawDefinition: A decision on an issue of fact in a civil or criminal case or an inquest.

verify.rawDefinition: To substantiate or prove the truth of something

vessel.rawDefinition: Any craft designed for transportation on water, such as a ship or boat.

veteran.rawDefinition: A person with long experience of a particular activity.

viable.rawDefinition: An organism that is able to live and develop.

compensate.rawDefinition: To do (something good) after (something bad) happens

consolidate.rawDefinition: To combine into a single unit; to group together or join.

constituency.rawDefinition: A district represented by one or more elected officials.

extract.rawDefinition: Something that is extracted or drawn out.

gaze.rawDefinition: A fixed look; a look of eagerness, wonder, or admiration; a continued look of attention.

generic.rawDefinition: A product sold under a generic name.

genocide.rawDefinition: The systematic killing of substantial numbers of people on the basis of their ethnicity, religion, political beliefs, social status, or other particularities.

oblige.rawDefinition: To constrain someone by force or by social, moral or legal means.

obsess.rawDefinition: (passive, constructed with "with") To be preoccupied with a single topic or emotion.

occurrence.rawDefinition: An actual instance when a situation occurs; an event or happening.

socialist.rawDefinition: One who practices or advocates socialism.

sole.rawDefinition: A wooden band or yoke put around the neck of an ox or cow in the stall.

striking.rawDefinition: (sometimes with out or through) To delete or cross out; to scratch or eliminate.
